description:
2026 BMW M4 Competition, 3.0 TC I6, XDrive, 523bhp, 8 Speed Automatic. AED 479,000 or AED 7,504 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 14,488 KMs - BMW Warranty valid until 31st August 2030 or 200,000 KMs - BMW Service Contract until 31st August 2030 or 100,000 KMs - Full Service History - GCC specification (AGMC) - Price includes VAT 
 - Dravitgrau Metallic Paint - Full leather Merino in Silverstone/Black - 19”/20” M Forged Wheels Double Spoke - Interior Trim in Carbon Fibre - Active Protection - Active Seat Ventilation in the Front Seats - Adaptive LED Headlights - Adaptive M Suspension - Air Collar - Ambient Light - Automatic Air Conditioning - BMW Drive Recorder - BMW Individual Lights Shadow Line - BMW Individual High-Gloss Shadow Line - BMW Individual High-Gloss Shadow Line with Extended Contents - BMW Live Cockpit Professional - Comfort Access System - Connected Drive Services - Driving Assistant Professional - Harman Kardon Surround Sound System - High-Beam Assistant - Interior and Exterior Mirror Package - M-Carbon Exterior Package - M Compound Brakes - M Drive Professional - M Drivers Package - M Sport Differential - M Sports Seats - M Seat Belts - Parking Assistant Plus - Apple CarPlay - Seat Adjustment Electric w/ Memory - Remote Engine Start - Wireless Charging - Seat Heating for Driver and Front Passenger
